puzzleDescription: Learn how to check if a number is divisible by 5 (i.e., when divided by 5, the remainder is 0).
objective: Check if a number is divisible by 5. Print 'Divisible' if it is, otherwise print 'Not divisible'.
hints: Use the modulo operator: 'num % 5 == 0' checks if there is no remainder.
Use an if-else structure to handle both outcomes.
